notes: Do not identify the immobiliser system from registration year alone.
Confirm the instrument-cluster manufacturer and part number before any bench or EEPROM work.
Keep Caddy III early, Caddy III facelift, Caddy IV and Caddy V as separate records.
Do not store exact button-by-button tool menu paths because software updates can move or rename them.
Tool support means broad family coverage only until the exact operation has been independently verified.
For Caddy V, identify keyed ignition versus KESSY before quoting or selecting a procedure.
Any unverified blade, frequency, transponder or adapter detail must remain marked research_required and must not be published as confirmed.
known_data_gaps: Exact cluster manufacturer and part-number splits by UK production date
Confirmed keyed-versus-KESSY split for Caddy V UK specifications
Exact tool coverage for Add Key and AKL by dashboard family
Verified remote frequencies and button layouts for each UK generation
Confirmed HU162T track variant on Caddy V
